assessment.note: She wants a bigger-scope conversation sooner, which signals unresolved role clarity and mild unease about the current situation.

new_queue.label: Scope conversation
new_queue.name: What would you want covered in that bigger scope conversation?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the specific decisions or expectations she wants clarified so the session lands on a useful final focus.

new_queue.label: Next-step focus
new_queue.name: What support from me would make the biggest difference on that?
new_queue.description: Final closer that invites manager support around the focus she just named without sounding like a checklist stop.
